11.name: 肾上腺素
11.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每次攻击时，有10%概率，装备速度<color=#FFDD42>+15%</color>持续<color=#FFDD42>2.5s</color></outline>

71.name: 武器专家1
71.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包里每有1把武器，伤害<color=#FFDD42>+1%</color></outline>

72.name: 武器专家2
72.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包里每有1把武器，伤害<color=#FFDD42>+3%</color></outline>

81.name: 唯一武器3
81.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包里只有1种类型武器时，该类型武器伤害<color=#FFDD42>+70%</color></outline>

82.name: 唯一武器2
82.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包里只有1种类型武器时，该类型武器伤害<color=#FFDD42>+20%</color></outline>

83.name: 唯一武器1
83.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包里只有1种类型武器时，该类型武器伤害<color=#FFDD42>+10%</color></outline>

111.name: 招财宝石银币
111.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每波结束额外获得<color=#FFDD42>随机</color>银币</outline>

1032.name: 剧毒之刃伤害持续时间

3001.name: 背包2级装备概率+10%
3001.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包刷出<color=#FFDD42>2级</color>装备的概率<color=#FFDD42>+10%</color></outline>

3002.name: 进入背包刷出装备数+1
3002.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每次进入背包刷出的装备数量<color=#FFDD42>+1</color></outline>

3003.name: 合成装备等级概率+1
3003.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包合成装备时有概率额外<color=#FFDD42>+1</color>级</outline>

3021.name: 暂存格的装备可以带入战斗
3021.desc: <outline color=black width=2>暂存格的装备可以<color=#FFDD42>带入战斗</color></outline>

3022.name: 每回合暂存格的装备合成等级有概率提高1级
3022.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每次进入背包暂存格的装备有概率提升<color=#FFDD42>1级</color></outline>

3040.name: 开局获得1次3选1
3040.desc: <outline color=black width=2>开局获得<color=#FFDD42>1次</color>强化属性3选1</outline>

3041.name: 强化属性3选1免费刷新1次
3041.desc: <outline color=black width=2>强化属性3选1免费刷新<color=#FFDD42>1次</color></outline>

3043.name: 稀有以上强化属性出现概率+10%
3043.desc: <outline color=black width=2>稀有或以上强化属性出现概率<color=#FFDD42>+10%</color></outline>

3061.name: 额外格子
3061.desc: <outline color=black width=2>开局有概率额外再获得<color=#FFDD42>3个</color>格子</outline>

3062.name: 格子增伤
3062.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每拥有1个格子，所有武器伤害<color=#FFDD42>+3%</color></outline>

3063.name: 无空格装备等级概率+1
3063.desc: <outline color=black width=2>当没有空格子时，每次进入背包随机1件装备有概率合成等级<color=#FFDD42>+1</color>级</outline>

3080.name: 合成装备获得银币
3080.desc: <outline color=black width=2>合成装备时可获得<color=#FFDD42>银币</color></outline>

3081.name: 银币利息
3081.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每次进入背包都会产生<color=#FFDD42>50%</color>的银币利息（上限100）</outline>

3082.name: 回收
3082.desc: <outline color=black width=2>未放入背包的装备将会折算成<color=#FFDD42>银币</color></outline>

3083.name: 银币增伤
3083.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每拥有50银币，武器伤害<color=#FFDD42>+10%</color>级</outline>

4002.name: 背包宝石加格子
4002.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包额外增加10个格子上限</outline>

4020.name: 弱化
4020.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每次进入背包有概率让1件装备<color=#FFDD42>合成等级-1</color></outline>

4040.name: 连续战斗
4040.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每2波才会进入背包</color></outline>

4060.name: 僵尸狂潮
4060.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每波怪物数量有<color=#FFDD42>50%概率翻倍</color></outline>

5000.name: 幸运
5000.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每次进入背包有概率让背包任意1个装备<color=#FFDD42>合成等级+1</color></outline>

5020.name: 整理大师1
5020.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包没有空格子时伤害<color=#FFDD42>+20%</color></outline>

5021.name: 整理大师2
5021.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包没有空格子时伤害<color=#FFDD42>+60%</color></outline>

5022.name: 整理大师3
5022.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包没有空格子时伤害<color=#FFDD42>+100%</color></outline>

8000.name: 鬼鲨吞噬buff
8000.desc: <outline color=black width=3>可吞噬4级进阶装备,获得其伤害属性和宝石属性,最多可吞噬3把</outline>

9021.name: 持续恢复生命
9021.desc: <outline color=black width=2>生命值低于50%时，每秒恢复<color=#FFDD42>10%</color>生命值，持续5s</outline>

9022.name: 减速停在原地
9022.desc: <outline color=black width=2>生命值低于50%时，每秒恢复<color=#FFDD42>10%</color>生命值，持续5s</outline>

9023.name: 战斗复活恢复满生命
9023.desc: <outline color=black width=2>生命值为0时，立即恢复<color=#FFDD42>100%</color>生命值</outline>

9064.name: 召唤停在原地
9064.desc: <outline color=black width=2>生命值低于50%时，每秒恢复<color=#FFDD42>10%</color>生命值，持续5s</outline>

10000.name: 伤害叠加
10000.desc: <outline color=black width=2>匕首攻击同1目标每次伤害<color=#FFDD42>+20%</color>最多叠加<color=#FFDD42>5</color>层</outline>

10004.name: 匕首解锁
10004.desc: <outline color=black width=2>解锁<color=#FFDD42>混沌之刃</color>和<color=#FFDD42>淬毒之刃</color>装备形态</outline>

10008.name: 混沌之焰
10008.desc: <outline color=black width=2>混沌之刃附带烈焰效果，命中敌人会<color=#FFDD42>灼烧</color></outline>

10010.name: 毒爆
10010.desc: <outline color=black width=2>中毒的单位死亡会<color=#FFDD42>爆炸</color></outline>

10012.name: 剧毒之地
10012.desc: <outline color=black width=2>淬毒之刃命中后有概率在地上产生毒液对触碰的单位造成<color=#FFDD42>伤害</color>并减速<color=#FFDD42>80%</color></outline>

10014.name: 毒液缠身
10014.desc: <outline color=black width=2>淬毒之刃中毒效果将持续到<color=#FFDD42>单位死亡</color></outline>

10016.name: 燃爆
10016.desc: <outline color=black width=2>混沌之刃命中后会产生<color=#FFDD42>爆炸</color></outline>

10018.name: 混沌之力
10018.desc: <outline color=black width=2>混沌之刃刀刀<color=#FFDD42>暴击</color>同时暴击伤害<color=#FFDD42>+15%</color></outline>

10200.name: 拳套加成1
10200.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包中与拳套相邻的冷兵器速度<color=#FFDD42>+5%</color></outline>

10203.name: 拳套加成2
10203.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包中与拳套相邻的冷兵器速度<color=#FFDD42>+10%</color></outline>

10602.name: 爆破灼烧
10602.desc: <outline color=black width=2>燃烧瓶命中后对周围造成<color=#FFDD42>范围伤害</color></outline>

10801.name: 洞穿
10801.desc: <outline color=black width=2>复合弓可穿透多<color=#FFDD42>1</color>个单位</outline>

10804.name: 弓解锁
10804.desc: <outline color=black width=2>解锁<color=#FFDD42>龙之力</color>和<color=#FFDD42>爆裂弓</color>装备形态</outline>

10805.name: 爆裂1
10805.desc: <outline color=black width=2>爆裂弓分裂的箭矢数量<color=#FFDD42>+1</color></outline>

10807.name: 连续爆炸
10807.desc: <outline color=black width=2>爆裂弓的爆裂箭矢每次穿透目标时会造成<color=#FFDD42>小范围</color>爆炸</outline>

10812.name: 毁灭爆炸
10812.desc: <outline color=black width=2>爆裂弓命中单位后会产生<color=#FFDD42>毁灭爆炸</color></outline>

10813.name: 爆裂2
10813.desc: <outline color=black width=2>爆裂弓爆裂的箭矢数量<color=#FFDD42>+2</color></outline>

10818.name: 黑龙灭世
10818.desc: <outline color=black width=2>龙之力变成<color=#FFDD42>黑龙</color>，移动方式改变，伤害+100%，命中敌人会造成<color=#FFDD42>黑炎灼烧</color></outline>

10820.name: 震慑
10820.desc: <outline color=black width=2>龙之力命中单位后会停在原地<color=#FFDD42>3</color>秒</outline>

11000.name: 定在原地
11000.desc: <outline color=black width=2>冰弹枪有<color=#FFDD42>30%</color>概率冻结僵尸,持续<color=#FFDD42>3s</color></outline>

11001.name: 冰冻增伤
11001.desc: <outline color=black width=2>冰弹枪对冰冻的僵尸造成的伤害<color=#FFDD42>+100%</color>个单位</outline>

11002.name: 冰弹分裂
11002.desc: <outline color=black width=2>冰弹枪命中后分裂<color=#FFDD42>3</color>个碎片</outline>

11200.name: 战术搭配1
11200.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包中与背心相邻的枪械伤害<color=#FFDD42>+20%</color></outline>

11202.name: 战术搭配2
11202.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包中与背心相邻的枪械伤害<color=#FFDD42>+30%</color></outline>

11203.name: 医疗背心
11203.desc: <outline color=black width=2>受到攻击时，有<color=#FFDD42>10%</color>的概率每秒持续回血，持续<color=#FFDD42>5s</color></outline>

11400.name: 多重飞斧
11400.desc: <outline color=black width=2>飞斧每次攻击后,下次投掷的飞斧数量<color=#FFDD42>+1</color></outline>

11401.name: 锋利飞斧
11401.desc: <outline color=black width=2>飞斧每次攻击后,下次伤害<color=#FFDD42>+50%</color></outline>

11402.name: 高速飞斧
11402.desc: <outline color=black width=2>飞斧每次攻击后,下次速度<color=#FFDD42>+20%</color></outline>

11403.name: 致命飞斧
11403.desc: <outline color=black width=2>飞斧每次攻击后,下次暴击率<color=#FFDD42>+50%</color></outline>

11404.name: 飞斧解锁
11404.desc: <outline color=black width=2>解锁<color=#FFDD42>战斗之斧</color>和<color=#FFDD42>雷电之斧</color>装备形态</outline>

11405.name: 威吓
11405.desc: <outline color=black width=2>被战斗之斧攻击的单位会被威吓，使其攻击力降低<color=#FFDD42>40%</color>，持续<color=#FFDD42>3秒</color></outline>

11406.name: 雷鸣
11406.desc: <outline color=black width=2>雷电之斧命中僵尸时，落雷有概率额外触发<color=#FFDD42>1次</color></outline>

11407.name: 绝地反击
11407.desc: <outline color=black width=2>生命值低于<color=#FFDD42>30%</color>战斗之斧速度+20%,伤害+50%</outline>

11408.name: 召回
11408.desc: <outline color=black width=2>雷电之斧飞出一段距离后会返回，返回过程也会造成伤害和触发<color=#FFDD42>雷击</color></outline>

11410.name: 致命反击
11410.desc: <outline color=black width=2>受到攻击时战斗之斧有概率暴击率<color=#FFDD42>+20%</color>暴击伤害+20%，持续5s</outline>

11411.name: 流血
11411.desc: <outline color=black width=2>被战斗之斧命中的单位会持续<color=#FFDD42>流血</color>5s</outline>

11412.name: 战神附体
11412.desc: <outline color=black width=2>战斗之斧伤害<color=#FFDD42>+300%</color>受到伤害减少<color=#FFDD42>30%</color></outline>

11414.name: 战意
11414.desc: <outline color=black width=2>战斗中每次受到伤害会叠加1层战意，伤害<color=#FFDD42>+2%</color>上限100%</outline>

11416.name: 天降雷
11416.desc: <outline color=black width=2>雷电之斧命中单位时会在随机位置释放<color=#FFDD42>3个</color>落雷</outline>

11418.name: 雷霆冲击
11418.desc: <outline color=black width=2>战斗开始每隔一段时间会生成<color=#FFDD42>雷霆冲击</color>，持续扫荡战场</outline>

11419.name: 强力雷击
11419.desc: <outline color=black width=2>雷电之斧触发的落雷伤害<color=#FFDD42>+30%</color></outline>

11420.name: 掌控
11420.desc: <outline color=black width=2>雷电之斧飞出后，会停留在原地<color=#FFDD42>3秒</color></outline>

11600.name: 回旋
11600.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每次攻击回旋镖都会<color=#FFDD42>回旋</color></outline>

11603.name: 击退
11603.desc: <outline color=black width=2>回旋镖命中后会产生<color=#FFDD42>击退</color>效果</outline>

11802.name: 保护伞
11802.desc: <outline color=black width=2>有护甲时,所有武器伤害<color=#FFDD42>+15%</color></outline>

11803.name: 盾牌格挡
11803.desc: <outline color=black width=2>受到攻击时,有<color=#FFDD42>15%</color>概率格挡伤害</outline>

11804.name: 盾牌解锁
11804.desc: <outline color=black width=2>解锁<color=#FFDD42>裁决之盾</color>和<color=#FFDD42>永生之盾</color>装备形态</outline>

11805.name: 审判
11805.desc: <outline color=black width=2>裁决之盾触发裁决概率<color=#FFDD42>+10%</color></outline>

11806.name: 牢不可破
11806.desc: <outline color=black width=2>永生之盾叠甲效果<color=#FFDD42>翻倍</color></outline>

11807.name: 裁决
11807.desc: <outline color=black width=2>裁决之盾造成的当前生命伤害<color=#FFDD42>+10%</color></outline>

11808.name: 永生
11808.desc: <outline color=black width=2>永生之盾初始获得<color=#FFDD42>等同其生命</color>的护甲值</outline>

11810.name: 裁决回盾
11810.desc: <outline color=black width=2>触发裁决时有概率回复<color=#FFDD42>10</color>点护甲</outline>

11812.name: 暗黑之剑
11812.desc: <outline color=black width=2>触发裁决时将召唤<color=#FFDD42>暗黑之剑</color>对范围内敌人造成30%的当前生命伤害</outline>

11814.name: 最高裁决
11814.desc: <outline color=black width=2>裁决之盾造成的当前生命伤害<color=#FFDD42>+20%</color></outline>

11816.name: 再生
11816.desc: <outline color=black width=2>战斗中每击败1个单位永生之盾生命上限<color=#FFDD42>+5%</color>上限100%</outline>

11818.name: 溢出
11818.desc: <outline color=black width=2>永生之盾增加的护甲<color=#FFDD42>无上限</color></outline>

11820.name: 回盾
11820.desc: <outline color=black width=2>永生之盾受到攻击时有概率回复<color=#FFDD42>10</color>点护甲</outline>

12403.name: 伤害加深
12403.desc: <outline color=black width=2>激光对主目标伤害每次<color=#FFDD42>+10%</color></outline>

12600.name: 横扫
12600.desc: <outline color=black width=2>重剑攻击方式变成<color=#FFDD42>横扫</color></outline>

12604.name: 重剑解锁
12604.desc: <outline color=black width=2>解锁<color=#FFDD42>虚无之剑</color>和<color=#FFDD42>无双重剑</color>装备形态</outline>

12606.name: 横扫回盾
12606.desc: <outline color=black width=2>无双重剑横扫命中后有概率增加<color=#FFDD42>10点</color>护甲</outline>

12610.name: 裂痕
12610.desc: <outline color=black width=2>虚无之剑命中单位可造成重伤使其受到伤害<color=#FFDD42>+30%</color></outline>

12612.name: 万剑穿心
12612.desc: <outline color=black width=2>虚无之剑攻击方式变为<color=#FFDD42>万剑穿心</color></outline>

12616.name: 剑刃回甲
12616.desc: <outline color=black width=2>无双重剑剑刃命后有概率增加<color=#FFDD42>10点</color>护甲</outline>

12618.name: 剑与盾
12618.desc: <outline color=black width=2>当背包中有永生盾，无双重剑剑刃变为红色，命中单位必定<color=#FFDD42>暴击</color></outline>

12620.name: 突破界限
12620.desc: <outline color=black width=2>无双重剑击杀单位伤害提升上限提高至<color=#FFDD42>200%</color></outline>

13000.name: 眩晕
13000.desc: <outline color=black width=2>地雷爆炸后，有概率眩晕单位<color=#FFDD42>1.5s</color></outline>

13001.name: 重伤
13001.desc: <outline color=black width=2>地雷爆炸后重伤单位，使其受到的伤害<color=#FFDD42>+15%</color>持续5秒</outline>

13004.name: 地雷解锁
13004.desc: <outline color=black width=2>解锁<color=#FFDD42>磁暴地雷</color>和<color=#FFDD42>激光地雷</color>装备形态</outline>

13008.name: 高频激光
13008.desc: <outline color=black width=2>激光地雷的激光连线伤害间隔缩短<color=#FFDD42>20%</color></outline>

13010.name: 弹射
13010.desc: <outline color=black width=2>磁暴地雷电球可弹射<color=#FFDD42>1</color>次</outline>

13012.name: 开花弹
13012.desc: <outline color=black width=2>磁暴地雷爆炸后会发射<color=#FFDD42>大量的电球</color></outline>

13014.name: 电磁
13014.desc: <outline color=black width=2>磁暴地雷爆炸后会产生4次<color=#FFDD42>雷击</color></outline>

13016.name: 干扰
13016.desc: <outline color=black width=2>激光地雷会让目标<color=#FFDD42>减速50%</color>持续<color=#FFDD42>5s</color></outline>

13018.name: 无限激光
13018.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每波战斗激光地雷将<color=#FFDD42>不会消失</color></outline>

13020.name: 红色激光
13020.desc: <outline color=black width=2>激光地雷激光变成红色，每次伤害递增<color=#FFDD42>5%</color>上限100%</outline>

13202.name: 急救
13202.desc: <outline color=black width=2>生命低于<color=#FFDD42>30%</color>时，立即回复最大生命值的<color=#FFDD42>20%</color>，每波可触发1次，多个腰带不叠加</outline>

13401.name: 太刀收藏家
13401.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包里每装备一把太刀，暴击率<color=#FFDD42>+5%</color></outline>

13402.name: 拔刀术
13402.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每次攻击，有概率拔刀<color=#FFDD42>2次</color></outline>

13404.name: 太刀解锁
13404.desc: <outline color=black width=2>解锁<color=#FFDD42>太刀疾风</color>和<color=#FFDD42>太刀鬼切</color>装备形态</outline>

13405.name: 静止
13405.desc: <outline color=black width=2>疾风龙卷飞出一段距离后会提留在原地<color=#FFDD42>5秒</color></outline>

13407.name: 牵引
13407.desc: <outline color=black width=2>疾风龙卷命中单位会<color=#FFDD42>牵引</color>怪物</outline>

13410.name: 飓风式
13410.desc: <outline color=black width=2>龙卷命中的单位移速将降为<color=#FFDD42>0</color>持续<color=#FFDD42>3秒</color></outline>

13412.name: 雷电风暴
13412.desc: <outline color=black width=2>龙卷变成雷电风暴，伤害<color=#FFDD42>+100%</color>同时会在四周触发落雷</outline>

13414.name: 狂风式
13414.desc: <outline color=black width=2>龙卷消失时会产生<color=#FFDD42>4</color>个小龙卷</outline>

13418.name: 修罗降临
13418.desc: <outline color=black width=2>鬼切攻击方式变为<color=#FFDD42>修罗斩</color>且吸血概率+30%</outline>

13420.name: 修罗4段
13420.desc: <outline color=black width=2>战斗中鬼切每次触发吸血效果时伤害<color=#FFDD42>+2%</color>上限100%</outline>

13600.name: 导弹雨
13600.desc: <outline color=black width=2>火箭筒每2次攻击后，第3次攻击将发射8枚导弹<color=#FFDD42>+20%</color></outline>

13601.name: 榴霰弹
13601.desc: <outline color=black width=2>导弹命中后，会产生范围<color=#FFDD42>榴霰弹</color>对僵尸造成持续伤害并减速</outline>

13602.name: 导弹分裂
13602.desc: <outline color=black width=2>生命低于<color=#FFDD42>30%</color>时，立即回复最大生命值的<color=#FFDD42>20%</color>，每波可触发1次，多个腰带不叠加</outline>

13801.name: 长矛相连
13801.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包中长矛如果相邻，相邻的长矛攻击时有概率<color=#FFDD42>二连发</color></outline>

13802.name: 高速之矛
13802.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每次命中目标会增加5%矛的装备速度，持续<color=#FFDD42>5s</color>，可叠加<color=#FFDD42>6次</color></outline>

13803.name: 沸血之矛
13803.desc: <outline color=black width=2>长矛每次攻击会消耗0.5%的生命值，伤害<color=#FFDD42>+60%</color>，穿透<color=#FFDD42>+2</color>，<color=#FFDD42>轻微击退</color><color=#FFDD42></outline>

13804.name: 长矛解锁
13804.desc: <outline color=black width=2>解锁<color=#FFDD42>黑暗之矛</color>和<color=#FFDD42>光之矛</color>装备形态</outline>

13806.name: 圣光穿透
13806.desc: <outline color=black width=2>光之矛每穿透1个单位，伤害增加<color=#FFDD42>10%</color></outline>

13808.name: 余刃
13808.desc: <outline color=black width=2>光之矛余刃造成的伤害次数<color=#FFDD42>+2</color></outline>

13810.name: 黑暗降临
13810.desc: <outline color=black width=2>黑暗之矛落地后持续<color=#FFDD42>5秒</color>才消失期间可造成伤害</outline>

13812.name: 黑暗领域
13812.desc: <outline color=black width=2>战斗开始地面被<color=#FFDD42>黑暗之力覆盖</color>,对单位造成持续伤害</outline>

13816.name: 圣光之力
13816.desc: <outline color=black width=2>光之矛命中单位后可以<color=#FFDD42>恢复</color>生命</outline>

13818.name: 圣光遗志
13818.desc: <outline color=black width=2>战斗中死亡可原地复活1次,复活后全局伤害<color=#FFDD42>+100%</color></outline>

13820.name: 圣光庇佑
13820.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每次释放光之矛时，有概率获得圣光庇佑免疫伤害<color=#FFDD42>3</color>秒</outline>

14001.name: 击退
14001.desc: <outline color=black width=2>脉冲激光附带<color=#FFDD42>击退</color>效果</outline>

14002.name: 扫射
14002.desc: <outline color=black width=2>脉冲激光攻击方式变成从左到右<color=#FFDD42>扫荡</color></outline>

14203.name: 棒气
14203.desc: <outline color=black width=2>棍棒命中后会产生<color=#FFDD42>棒气</color></outline>

14204.name: 棒滚解锁
14204.desc: <outline color=black width=2>解锁<color=#FFDD42>金箍棒</color>和<color=#FFDD42>玄武棒</color>装备形态</outline>

14208.name: 烧火棍
14208.desc: <outline color=black width=2>金箍棒附带火焰效果体积<color=#FFDD42>+10%</color>,命中单位会灼烧</outline>

14210.name: 棒击
14210.desc: <outline color=black width=2>金箍棒旋转结束后会释放1次大范围棒击造成<color=#FFDD42>150%</color>伤害</outline>

14212.name: 定海神针
14212.desc: <outline color=black width=2>金箍棒在旋转期间会释放<color=#FFDD42>定海神针</color>，必定<color=#FFDD42>暴击</color>且击晕单位<color=#FFDD42>0.5s</color></outline>

14214.name: 棒刃
14214.desc: <outline color=black width=2>金箍棒释放时会产生<color=#FFDD42>棒刃</color></outline>

14216.name: 回
14216.desc: <outline color=black width=2>玄武棒到达边缘后会<color=#FFDD42>返回</color></outline>

14218.name: 碾
14218.desc: <outline color=black width=2>玄武棒翻滚时会<color=#FFDD42>越来越大</color>,伤害也持续<color=#FFDD42>递增</color></outline>

14220.name: 石
14220.desc: <outline color=black width=2>玄武棒对石化的单位额外造成<color=#FFDD42>100%</color>伤害</outline>

14401.name: 治愈之花
14401.desc: <outline color=black width=2>饼之花命中单位后会<color=#FFDD42>恢复生命</color></outline>

14403.name: 盛开
14403.desc: <outline color=black width=2>饼之花释放过程会持续产生<color=#FFDD42>旋转花瓣</color></outline>

14405.name: 生长
14405.desc: <outline color=black width=2>饼之花释放后会持续<color=#FFDD42>变大</color></outline>

15000.name: 叠加
15000.desc: <outline color=black width=2>多个戒指加成效果可<color=#FFDD42>叠加</color></outline>

15001.name: 伤害
15001.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包中与戒指相邻的武器伤害<color=#FFDD42>+10%</color></outline>

15002.name: 暴击伤害
15002.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包中与戒指相邻的武器暴击伤害<color=#FFDD42>+5%</color></outline>

15004.name: 戒指解锁
15004.desc: <outline color=black width=2>解锁<color=#FFDD42>宝石之戒</color>和<color=#FFDD42>幻化之戒</color>装备形态</outline>

15005.name: 连击宝石
15005.desc: <outline color=black width=2>宝石之戒有概率额外生成<color=#FFDD42>连击宝石</color></outline>

15006.name: 幻化伤害
15006.desc: <outline color=black width=2>幻化之戒变化的武器伤害<color=#FFDD42>+100%</color></outline>

15007.name: 璀璨宝石
15007.desc: <outline color=black width=2>宝石之戒概率额外生成<color=#FFDD42>璀璨宝石</color></outline>

15008.name: 幻化暴击
15008.desc: <outline color=black width=2>幻化之戒变化的武器暴击率<color=#FFDD42>+20%</color></outline>

30010.name: 背包2级装备概率+20%
30010.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包刷出<color=#FFDD42>2级</color>装备的概率<color=#FFDD42>+20%</color></outline>

50140.name: 璀璨宝石
50140.desc: <outline color=black width=2>武器伤害<color=#FFDD42>+100%</color>,速度<color=#FFDD42>+30%</color>,暴击率<color=#FFDD42>+30%</color>,暴击伤害<color=#FFDD42>+100%</color></outline>

118001.name: 裁决之盾
118001.desc: <outline color=black width=2>受到攻击时，有10%的概率发动裁决，对单个敌人造成当前生命的<color=#FFDD42>10%</color>伤害</outline>

118002.name: 永生之盾
118002.desc: <outline color=black width=2>战斗开始获得永生盾生命值<color=#FFDD42>50%</color>的护甲值,1.2倍叠甲效果</outline>

126200.name: 无双重剑增伤
126200.desc: <outline color=black width=2>获得无双重剑时，后续每击杀1个单位伤害<color=#FFDD42>+1%</color></outline>

138011.name: 黑暗之矛秒杀
138011.desc: <outline color=black width=2>黑暗之矛秒杀生命值上限<color=#FFDD42>+10%</color></outline>

138012.name: 黑暗之矛秒杀
138012.desc: <outline color=black width=2>黑暗之矛秒杀生命值上限<color=#FFDD42>+10%</color></outline>

142000.name: 金箍棒变大
142000.desc: <outline color=black width=2>金箍棒旋转期间持续变大</outline>

142120.name: 定海神针暴击
142120.desc: <outline color=black width=2>金箍棒在旋转期间会释放<color=#FFDD42>定海神针</color>，必定<color=#FFDD42>暴击</color>且击晕单位<color=#FFDD42>0.3s</color></outline>

142180.name: 碾体积
142180.desc: <outline color=black width=2>玄武棒翻滚时会<color=#FFDD42>越来越大</color>,伤害也持续<color=#FFDD42>递增</color>且有概率<color=#FFDD42>碾碎</color>石化的单位</outline>

142181.name: 碾伤害
142181.desc: <outline color=black width=2>玄武棒翻滚时会<color=#FFDD42>越来越大</color>,伤害也持续<color=#FFDD42>递增</color>且有概率<color=#FFDD42>碾碎</color>石化的单位</outline>

144000.name: 弹道减速
144000.desc: <outline color=black width=2>饼之花弹道速度持续<color=#FFDD42>减速</color></outline>

144050.name: 花体积
144050.desc: <outline color=black width=2>饼之花释放后会持续<color=#FFDD42>变大</color></outline>

150000.name: 暴击率
150000.desc: <outline color=black width=2>背包中与戒指相邻的武器暴击率<color=#FFDD42>+3%</color></outline>

150001.name: 宝石之戒抽宝石
150001.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每回合生成<color=#FFDD42>1颗</color>宝石,无法被复制宝石复制</outline>

150002.name: 幻化之戒抽装备
150002.desc: <outline color=black width=2>下回合会变化成<color=#FFDD42>4级进阶</color>装备,无法被复制宝石复制</outline>
